Export plan + output semantics.question: Export produces one output PNG per what unit?
Export plan + output semantics.answer: Per atlas region / source PNG file

Export plan + output semantics.question: Pre-flight validation of source PNG existence?
Export plan + output semantics.answer: Pre-flight, continue on missing, collect as errors

Worker architecture + concurrency.question: Where does sharp run?
Worker architecture + concurrency.answer: Main process, async concurrent (confirmed after user noted future 300+ image case; sequential + libvips internal threading suffices, worker_threads is a Phase 9 migration path if needed)

Worker architecture + concurrency.question: Cancel semantics?
Worker architecture + concurrency.answer: Finish in-flight file, stop new ones, keep partial output

Worker architecture + concurrency.question: Per-file error handling?
Worker architecture + concurrency.answer: Skip + continue + surface in error list

deferred_ideas: Multi-JSON shared-images export — future feature where multiple skeleton JSONs export against a shared images/ folder; export plan needs to merge peaks across rigs (max effective scale per region across all loaded rigs). Not in Phase 6 scope.
Worker_threads migration if Phase 9 hardening shows main-process responsiveness suffering at 300+ files.
